title: gpt-image-2
prompt: Primary request: Cartoon flat illustration, bright warm color palette, humorous and fun, social media science article style, non-photorealistic, trendy internet vibe. Scene: A funny cartoon person doing a selfie video talk to camera (A-Roll, main character labeled with a big 'A' on shirt) in the center, surrounded by tiny floating B-roll clips: a cooking hand cutting tomato, a cat on the street, fingers typing on keyboard, city skyline, bubbling hot pot, coffee pouring, all labeled with little 'B' tags. Big bold Chinese text at the top: 'A-Roll和B-Roll到底是什么？', small subtitle below: '90%短视频都靠它撑场面'. 16:9 aspect ratio, clean white background with soft warm gradient accents, no realistic details, cute and playful.
